generated_oml:
instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building within Architecture, Engineering, Construction and Operations (AECO) domain serving as cyber-physical asset across lifecycle"
    base:contains BuildingControlSystemSensor, BuildingControlSystemActuator, BuildingControlSystemController
]

instance BuildingControlSystemSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor component for real-time data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeSensorData
]

instance BuildingControlSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator component for automated infrastructure operation"
]

instance BuildingControlSystemController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Control System controller component for logic execution"
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingControlSystemSensor
]

instance SensorDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Building Control System for synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataExchangeEnabler
]

instance BIMEnhancedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-derived geometric model enhanced with Building Control System components (sensors, actuators, controllers) for unified semantic foundation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RealTimeDataExchangeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange mechanisms synchronizing physical building operations and digital counterparts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automated transformation of BIM models into structured DT artifacts with modular architecture and standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for building performance analysis across lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis service for infrastructure optimization and decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for resource efficiency and operational improvements"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for facility management and system state visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for proactive maintenance and risk mitigation"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated building performance metrics for design and operational decisions"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for infrastructure analysis and optimization"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized operational parameters for energy efficiency and cost reduction"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization of system states for facility managers"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts and risk assessments"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments, Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to automatically generate deployable artifacts, real-time data exchange for synchronization between physical and digital systems, and evolution through modular integration of custom services. Roles including Building Control Engineers (device modeling), Facility Managers (monitoring and operation), and DT Engineers (custom service development) govern each phase, ensuring seamless transitions from static BIM representations to dynamic operational systems."
]
